BUILD.bazel.content:
"""Versioned app 'oauth2-proxy' for k8s-a -- generated by defn gen."""

load("//kernel:fmt.bzl", "fmt_test")
load("//kernel:tagged.bzl", "tagged_file")
load("//kernel/interface/app:app.bzl", "app_kustomize_versioned")

app_kustomize_versioned(
    name = "app",
    chart_tgz = "oauth2-proxy-10.6.0.tgz",
    k8s_version = "1.36.1",
    parent_source_path = "tenant/library/app/oauth2-proxy",
    parent_workspace_path = "var/app/oauth2-proxy",
    workspace_path = "var/app/oauth2-proxy/k8s-a",
)

fmt_test(
    name = "build_bazel_fmt",
    src = "BUILD.bazel",
    tool = "buildifier",
)

tagged_file(
    name = "build_bazel_tag",
    src = "BUILD.bazel",
    tags = [
        "bazel",
        "bazel-build",
    ],
)

[fmt_test(
    name = "dispatch_cue_fmt",
    src = src,
    tool = "cue",
) for src in glob(["dispatch.cue"], allow_empty = True)]

[tagged_file(
    name = "dispatch_cue_tag",
    src = src,
    tags = [
        "cue",
        "source",
    ],
) for src in glob(["dispatch.cue"], allow_empty = True)]

kustomization.yaml.content:
# Generated by defn gen from app.cue + catalog. DO NOT EDIT.
apiVersion: kustomize.config.k8s.io/v1beta1
kind: Kustomization
helmGlobals:
  chartHome: charts
helmCharts:
  - name: oauth2-proxy
    version: 10.6.0
    releaseName: oauth2-proxy
    namespace: oauth2-proxy
    includeCRDs: true
    valuesInline:
      config:
        configFile: |-
          provider = "oidc"
          provider_display_name = "Dex"
          client_id = "oauth2-proxy"
          email_domains = [ "defn.sh" ]
          scope = "openid profile email groups"
          oidc_groups_claim = "groups"
          cookie_secure = true
          cookie_httponly = true
          cookie_samesite = "lax"
          cookie_expire = "12h"
          cookie_refresh = "1h"
          cookie_csrf_per_request = false
          cookie_csrf_expire = "15m"
          ssl_insecure_skip_verify = true
          upstreams = [ "static://202" ]
          reverse_proxy = true
          set_xauthrequest = true
          pass_user_headers = true
          session_store_type = "redis"
          redis_connection_url = "redis://redis.oauth2-proxy.svc.cluster.local:6379"
        existingSecret: oauth2-proxy
      ingress:
        enabled: false
      sessionStorage:
        redis:
          standalone:
            connectionUrl: "redis://redis.oauth2-proxy.svc.cluster.local:6379"
        type: redis
images:
  - name: quay.io/oauth2-proxy/oauth2-proxy
    newName: host.k3d.internal:5000/mirror/quay.io/oauth2-proxy/oauth2-proxy
    newTag: v7.15.2
